zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Colville - Third Laird of Oxnam於1194年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾奧可南時，他的父親Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnam31歲，母親Amabilis de Colville27歲。他於1222年與Marshall在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1250年在英國蘇格蘭享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Colville - Third Laird of Oxnam于1194年出生在苏格兰洛包爾奧可南时，他的父亲Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnam31岁，母亲Amabilis de Colville27岁。他于1222年与Marshall在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1250年在英国苏格兰享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Colville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Colleville in Seine-Maritime, France, named with the Scandinavian personal name Koli (see Cole 2) + Old French ville ‘settlement, village’. The Scottish branch of the family were descended from Philip de Colville, who came to Scotland as a household knight of kings Malcolm IV (1153–65) and William ‘the Lion’ (1165–1214).

variants.name: Cole
meanings: English: usually from the Middle English and Old French personal name Col(e), Coll(e), Coul(e), a pet form of Nicol (see Nichol and Nicholas ), a common personal name from the mid 13th century onward. English families with this name migrated to Scotland and to Ulster (especially Fermanagh).

English: occasionally perhaps from a different (early) Middle English personal name Col, of native English or Scandinavian origin. Old English Cola was originally a nickname from Old English col ‘coal’ in the sense ‘coal-black (of hair), swarthy’ and is the probable source of most of the examples in Domesday Book. In the northern and eastern counties of England settled by Vikings in the 10th and 11th centuries, alternative sources are Old Norse Kolr and Koli (either from a nickname ‘the swarthy one’ or a short form of names in Kol-), and Old Norse Kollr (from a nickname, perhaps ‘the bald one’).
English: nickname for someone with swarthy skin or black hair, from Middle English col, coul(e) ‘charcoal, coal’ (Old English col).

variants.name: Colvin
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Donegal, Antrim): variant of   Colville  , probably reflecting a local pronunciation. The name was taken to Ulster in the 17th century.
Manx: if not identical with 1, perhaps from the Old Norse personal name Kolbeinn, with /v/ substituted for /b/.

English: from the rare Middle English personal name Colwin, Colvin, which may be a borrowing into English of a Welsh name whose modern form is Collwyn ‘white’, or of colwyn ‘doe, puppy, pet dog’, or of the placename Colwyn (Denbighshire, Radnorshire).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Colville - Third Laird of Oxnam was born in 1194, in Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Scotland, his father, Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnam, was 31 and his mother, Amabilis de Colville, was 27. He married Marshall in 1222, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1250, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Colville - Third Laird of Oxnam est né en 1194, à Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Écosse, son père, Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnam, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Amabilis de Colville, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Marshall en 1222, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1250, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Colville - Third Laird of Oxnam 1194 in Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnam 31 und seine Mutter Amabilis de Colville 27. Er hat 1222 in Schottland, United Kingdom Marshall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1250 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Colville - Third Laird of Oxnam è nato il nel 1194 nel Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnam, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Amabilis de Colville, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Marshall nel 1222, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1250, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Colville - Third Laird of Oxnamが1194年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアオクスナムで生まれた時，父Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnamは31歳，母Amabilis de Colvilleは27歳であった。1222年にイギリススコットランドでMarshallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1250年にイギリススコットランドで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Colville - Third Laird of Oxnam(이)가 1194년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 스남에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnam(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Amabilis de Colville(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1222년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Marshall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1250년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Colville - Third Laird of Oxnam nasceu em 1194, em Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Scotland, seu pai, Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnam, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Amabilis de Colville, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Marshall em 1222, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1250, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Colville - Third Laird of Oxnam родился в 1194 г. в местности окснам, роксбургшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnam было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Amabilis de Colville, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Marshall в 1222 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1250 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Colville - Third Laird of Oxnam nació en 1194, en Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Scotland, su papá, Thomas de Colville - Second Laird of Oxnam, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Amabilis de Colville, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Marshall en 1222, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1250, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años.
